curmudgeon_rubric: DIRECTIVE-003 (updated design rubric used for EXP-211-redesign)
integration_gate: Per HNOTE-OPERATOR-PHASE-B-DRAIN-PRIORITY-003 and HNOTE-001 itself: no operator approval gate; decider may auto-integrate after curmudgeon clears.

hnote_status_recommendation.note: HNOTE-PHASE-B-DESIGN-REFRESH-COMMISSION-001 commissioned three EXPs (B1, B2, B3). Only B1 is delivered. Do NOT mark the HNOTE consumed yet — leave it pending. Add a partial-progress field (consumed_progress or similar) so the next analyst run picks up B2 (DOCX typography) per the recommended sequencing.

summary: EXP-249 routes the verdict pie chart through the existing design-system tokens, adds per-verdict --label-* ink tokens for WCAG AA in-slice contrast, enlarges legend swatch to 24x24 with 48px row stride (AAA tap-target envelope), and deletes the now-redundant matchMedia DOM-toggle script. Six coupled changes in build-scripts/generate-html.js (three CSS :root blocks, two JS edits — color maps and generator function, one JS deletion). Smoke test passes: token-resolved fills, no hex literals, structural envelope and class names preserved. Computed contrast table included for curmudgeon audit. PIE CHART ONLY scope per HNOTE-001 boundary.
what_curmudgeon_should_check: Visual delta in light mode: 4 in-slice labels switch from white-with-shadow to dark ink (StdModel, SelfCon, Misleading, Unfalsifiable). Refuted and NotDemo stay light. Acceptable?

Dark-mode SelfCon contrast 4.3:1 — borderline AA-large (the in-slice 16px bold label qualifies as "large" per WCAG ≥14pt-bold). If curmudgeon prefers a buffer, font-size bump from 16 to 18 is a one-line patch (the EXP describes it).
Removal of the matchMedia toggle script — verify dark-mode toggle still works on theme change (it should: CSS @media handles it natively, and the same pattern is already used by .vb-bar et al.).
Legend stride 28→48 increases legend SVG height. Verify the flex-row wrapper still lays out correctly at desktop and mobile breakpoints.
Print pathway: @media print:root now carries --label-* tokens. Verify the printed pie matches light theme regardless of OS theme (was implicitly via JS, now explicitly via CSS).

Token naming: --label-{refuted,stdmodel,selfcon,misleading,notdemo,unfalsifiable}. Six new tokens. Should they alphabetize into the existing :root block, or is end-of-block append acceptable? (EXP defers to human-group convention.)
next_phase_b_steps: EXP-250 (next analyst run, Mode 2): HNOTE-001 §B2 — DOCX typography alignment. Update build-doc-v4.js to use Source Serif 4 / Inter / JetBrains Mono. Source OTF/TTF font variants if Word does not consume woff2.

EXP-251 (run after that): HNOTE-001 §B3 — design-system prefix unification (.vb-/.vl-/.sc- → .ds- or operator alternative). Recommended sequencing per HNOTE-001: B3 last so the rename has a stable class set.
EXP-252 (lower priority, no sequencing dependency): HNOTE-002 — verdict-chip → definition click-through. EXP-249 already sized the legend stride to absorb this without further reflow.
